survey.message: Help shape Cycling Zone. Take our 5 min survey
survey.adminPreviewHint: (Admin preview, only visible to you until flag is flipped)

nps.question: How likely are you to recommend Cycling Zone to a friend?
nps.reasonPlaceholder: Tell us in a sentence or two

consent.title: We use data to make the game better
consent.intro: You decide what we may measure. You can always change your choices in your profile under "Privacy".

necessary.label: Necessary
necessary.desc: Login, session and your account settings. The game does not work without these.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.desc: We anonymously measure how the game is used: which buttons frustrate players (Microsoft Clarity) and where players come from (Google Analytics), so we can fix bad UX.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.desc: Not used today. If we later show ads or remarket, it only happens if you say yes here.

email_marketing.label: Email
email_marketing.desc: Occasional newsletters about major season updates or events. Transactional emails (auction won, etc.) do not depend on this choice.
